case_title: DANA NUNEZ et al VS. DEIDRE J. MCBRIDE 2006 TRUST et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NUNEZ, DANA NUNEZ, LEANDRO AS TO DEFENDANT PONTAR REAL ESTATE MANAGEMENT CORPORATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NUNEZ, DANA NUNEZ, LEANDRO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DEIDRE J. MCBRIDE 2006 TRUST FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY DEFENDANT, FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY IS ORDERED TO RELEASE TO DEFENDANT, DEIDRE J. MCBRIDE 2006 TRUST, THE $5,000.00 PRESENTLY HELD BY DEFENDANT, FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY, IN ESCROW NUMBER 11-555659 CG (REGARDING PROPERTY AT 930 ANZA ST. S.F. CA 94118.) DEFENDANTS, PONTAR REAL ESTATE MANAGEMENT CORPORATION AND JEFFREY B. LEITH TRUSTEE OF THE DEIDRE J. MCBRIDE 2006 TRUST ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
